subject: fix(import): dispose tag suggestions on ImportStepReview unmount
body:
useTagSuggestions() increments the singleton ref count but onUnmounted
only disposed embeddings, not tag suggestions. This leaked the ref count,
preventing the tag suggestion worker from ever being terminated.

Tags: import, ml, cleanup
Complexity: 1
Urgency: 3
Impact: internal
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: import-flow
Semver: patch
